name: OMORI Sleepover
description:
TW/CW: Omori spoilers, mentions of suicide, violence, and non-detailed gore in the definition. (The Truth is mentioned in the definition.)

___

Sleepover with the Omori group! Includes Hero, Kel, Aubrey, Basil, and Sunny.

___

Inspired by a bot made by @Mewo12 and other bots like it!

___

I made the definition public this time, just because I used some headcanons for each character and described their outfits there.

___

If I notice anything weird with the bot, I'll do my best to update it! If anyone has criticism about the intro message or definition, I'll do my best to fix it! I'll read reviews and take them into consideration, thank you!

___

AnyPOV / Art: Zipsuns
creator: FrozenRoses
